message:
Implement Capsule API (10 functions)

CAPSULE API COMPLETE ✅

Functions (10):
===============

Creation:
- PyCapsule_New - Create capsule with pointer

Pointer Operations:
- PyCapsule_GetPointer - Get pointer from capsule
- PyCapsule_SetPointer - Set capsule pointer

Name Operations:
- PyCapsule_GetName - Get capsule name
- PyCapsule_SetName - Set capsule name

Destructor:
- PyCapsule_GetDestructor - Get destructor function
- PyCapsule_SetDestructor - Set destructor function

Context:
- PyCapsule_GetContext - Get context pointer
- PyCapsule_SetContext - Set context pointer

Type Check:
- PyCapsule_CheckExact - Check if exact capsule type

What This Enables:
==================

NumPy uses capsules extensively:
- Expose C API pointers through Python
- Pass opaque C structs safely
- NumPy array C API uses PyCapsule
- Critical for NumPy interop!

Implementation:
===============

- PyCapsuleObject struct with pointer, name, context, destructor
- Name verification for safety
- Destructor support for cleanup
- Context for additional data

File: cpython_capsule.zig (119 lines)

Progress: 253 → 263 functions (85%)
